# Overview

Even though LSMS 2.0 relies on a harmonized questionnaire, several things may differ from one country to the next. To work properly, this project needs to know about those survey-specific parameters.

To inform the project about these parameters, the user will need to provide these details in the `_parameters.R` file in the root of the project folder.

```
.
├── 01_data
├── 02_validation
├── 03_monitoring
├── dev
├── i18n
├── inst
├── lsms2_dms.Rproj
├── R
├── README.md
├── renv
├── renv.lock
├── run_workflow.R
└── _parameters.R # 👈 this file
```

These parameters can be categorized into a few groups:

1. Server
2. Questionnaires
3. Validation workflow
4. Report period

Each of these parameters will help the program do the right things as it acts on your behalf.

Each of these will be explained in further details in the following chapters.
